name: trove
description: Trove Coding workflow framework. Provides /trove:init (bootstrap; auto-seeds canonical files from existing project evidence when applicable), /trove:session (begin a fresh session), /trove:resume (continue from a handover), /trove:save (update meta after work), and /trove:handover (write session resume document). Auto-loads canonical trove files at session start, resume, and after compaction via SessionStart hook (no-op in projects without a trove/ directory).
